svg.title: Transformer QA pipeline diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing question encoding through self-attention, cross-attention with a medical passage, and decoder output generation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does tokenization and embedding work in a Transformer?')
sendPrompt('How does self-attention capture word relationships in the encoder?')
sendPrompt('What does the encoder output represent and how is it used?')
sendPrompt('How is the medical passage encoded and used for cross-attention?')
sendPrompt('How does encoder-decoder cross-attention extract the answer from the passage?')
sendPrompt('How does the Transformer decoder generate tokens autoregressively?')
sendPrompt('What are the greedy-decoded output tokens from the decoder steps?')
